name: linear-swarm
description: Ship a whole Linear project in one session by fanning out parallel worktree or Daytona-sandbox agents, auditing with Codex + specialist reviewers, running a structural smoke, sequentially merging PRs, deploying, and verifying against live production. Gracefully enhanced by Every's compound-engineering-plugin when both are installed.

vercel_ai_gateway_key.description: Vercel AI Gateway API key (for cheap-tier Daytona workers). Get one at https://vercel.com/ai-gateway

daytona_api_key.description: Daytona API key (for cloud sandbox workers). Get one at https://app.daytona.io

linear_api_key.description: Linear API key (for posting progress comments). Get one at https://linear.app/settings/api
